title: mentha arvensis
intro: Mentha arvensis, also known as wild mint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis include relief from digestive issues, nausea, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in reducing stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Mentha arvensis include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, soothe digestive issues, and provide a calming effect.
